mapper.sql: t.id, t.occupancy_rule_key, t.model_code, t.order_type, t.store_code, t.region_code, t.activity_type, t.customer_type, t.finance_order_flag, t.special_approval_flag, t.occupancy_hours, t.enable_flag, t.priority, t.remark, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_config_vehicle_occupancy t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_config_vehicle_occupancy t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.model_code = #{params.modelCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_config_vehicle_occupancy ( occupancy_rule_key, model_code, order_type, store_code, region_code, activity_type, customer_type, finance_order_flag, special_approval_flag, occupancy_hours, enable_flag, priority, remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{occupancyRuleKey}, #{modelCode}, #{orderType}, #{storeCode}, #{regionCode}, #{activityType}, #{customerType}, #{financeOrderFlag}, #{specialApprovalFlag}, #{occupancyHours}, #{enableFlag}, #{priority}, #{remark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_config_vehicle_occupancy ( occupancy_rule_key, model_code, order_type, store_code, region_code, activity_type, customer_type, finance_order_flag, special_approval_flag, occupancy_hours, enable_flag, priority, remark, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.occupancyRuleKey}, #{item.modelCode}, #{item.orderType}, #{item.storeCode}, #{item.regionCode}, #{item.activityType}, #{item.customerType}, #{item.financeOrderFlag}, #{item.specialApprovalFlag}, #{item.occupancyHours}, #{item.enableFlag}, #{item.priority}, #{item.remark}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_config_vehicle_occupancy t SET
t.occupancy_hours = #{occupancyHours},
t.enable_flag = #{enableFlag},
t.priority = #{priority},
t.remark = #{remark},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_config_vehicle_occupancy t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
